items.summary: The shared review parser now requires the governed runtime config, validates required sections and allowed vocabularies directly from the loaded contract, and fails closed on illegal leader arbitration combinations.

The board now derives a canonical unresolved list from the effective verdict plus the actual repair and deferred-item checklists, so persisted machine evidence matches the runtime decision after overrides.
BoardBlockedError now gets caught at the executeBoard boundary and converted into the typed blocked return shape instead of escaping to the CLI fatal-exit path.
pathExists and buildAuditEnvelope were extracted to a shared audit-utils module and both board.ts and index.ts now import the same implementation.
attemptAutoFix now receives a context label so reviewer parse failures no longer claim the failing output came from the leader.
